mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_key_quota_window ( provider_key_id, window_type, quota_limit, quota_used, window_start_at, reset_at, status ) VALUES ( #{providerKeyId}, #{windowType}, #{quotaLimit}, #{quotaUsed}, #{windowStartAt}, #{resetAt}, #{status} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quota_limit = VALUES(quota_limit), quota_used = VALUES(quota_used), window_start_at = VALUES(window_start_at), reset_at = VALUES(reset_at), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_key_id, window_type, quota_limit, quota_used, window_start_at, reset_at, status, updated_at FROM provider_key_quota_window WHERE provider_key_id = #{providerKeyId} ORDER BY id ASC
